brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 29, mirroring the emotional capitulation seen during the August 2024 bottom. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin growth is quietly expanding, signaling that smart money is building dry powder for deployment just as it did before that prior relief rally. The tape is punishing late sellers and setting the stage for accumulation.
brain_consensus.headline: Capitulation Echoes as Smart Money Loads Up

next_move.reasoning: Despite 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug Disbelief, the massive ETF flow surge (+45), BTC dominance fade (+25), and deeply negative MVRV Z-score divergence (-16) show this is NOT a bottoming structure but a mid-cycle chop with trapped capital; my 0% direction accuracy screams I've been forcing directional calls when regime is actually sideways-with-volatility, and current score ~46 sits at Anxiety/Complacency boundary with conflicting momentum signals.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 AND funding compresses below 0.003% while VIX spikes above 22 would confirm breakdown to Panic

narrative.headline: Capitulation Echoes as Smart Money Loads Up

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests the current anxiety phase will resolve with a sharp mean-reversion rally as sidelined capital from stablecoin growth is deployed, mimicking the August 2024 recovery pattern.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting momentum signals and a sideways-with-volatility regime keep us pinned at Anxiety until either Fear & Greed breaks below 25 to confirm a down-move or BTC reclaims $68K with sustained ETF inflows to confirm upside.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls HOLD at Anxiety while the narrative writer implicitly leans toward accumulation and upside; the split favors the analyst's higher trust weight and stricter phase anchoring.
